stimulus: According to the older CMY (cyan-magenta-yellow) printing model, red is produced by overlapping yellow and magenta inks. However, red ______blank generated as a primary color in modern RGB digital displays.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The convention being tested is the use of verb forms within a sentence. A main clause requires a finite (tensed) verb to perform the action of the subject ("red"), and this choice supplies the present tense verb "is generated" to indicate that red is generated as a primary color in modern RGB displays.

Choice A is incorrect because the nonfinite participle "having been generated" doesn't supply the main clause with a finite verb. Choice B is incorrect because the nonfinite participle "being generated" doesn't supply the main clause with a finite verb. Choice C is incorrect because the nonfinite to-infinitive "to be generated" doesn't supply the main clause with a finite verb.
